title: Fix footer font colours and hamburger/filter menu icon colours for readability

requirements.text: Update all text colours in the footer section (Footer.tsx) to a readable, high-contrast colour suitable for the dark background — including brand info, quick navigation links, menu category links, contact details, and newsletter text. Ensure all text meets readable contrast standards.

quotes: the last part of the page change the colour of the for with suitable for reading text

acceptanceCriteria: All text in the footer is clearly readable against the footer background
Section headings, body text, links, and labels in the footer all use a suitable high-contrast colour
No footer text appears invisible or low-contrast against its background

requirements.text: Update the colour of the hamburger menu icon (three-line icon) in the Navbar (Navbar.tsx) to a suitable, high-contrast colour so it is clearly visible against the navbar background on mobile.

quotes: the three line near cartoon button in that also change the filters colur as suitable one

acceptanceCriteria: The three-line (hamburger) icon in the mobile navbar is clearly visible against the navbar background
The icon colour is consistent with the overall design palette and readable at all scroll states

requirements.text: Update the filter tab colours in the MenuTabs component (MenuTabs.tsx) to a suitable, readable colour — including active and inactive tab states — so the filter labels are clearly visible against the tab bar background.

quotes: change the filters colur as suitable one

acceptanceCriteria: All filter tab labels in MenuTabs are clearly readable in both active and inactive states
Tab text and icons have sufficient contrast against the tab bar background
Active tab is visually distinguishable from inactive tabs with readable colours

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Do not alter the overall layout or structure of the Footer, Navbar, or MenuTabs components — only update colours
nonGoals: Redesigning the footer layout or structure
Adding new navigation items or sections
